title: Update PhaseDetail status dropdown with valid transitions and lock support
job:
Edit plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/PhaseDetail.tsx

Read the existing file. Find the status dropdown that shows all PhaseStatus options.

Change it so it only shows VALID transitions from the current status. Import or define the VALID_TRANSITIONS map (same as in state.ts):

const VALID_TRANSITIONS: Record<PhaseStatus, PhaseStatus[]> = {
  DraftSpec: ['SpecApproved'],
  SpecApproved: ['PRDAttached', 'DraftSpec'],
  PRDAttached: ['ReadyForBuild', 'SpecApproved'],
  ReadyForBuild: ['Accepted', 'ReworkRequired'],
  Accepted: ['Closed'],
  ReworkRequired: ['DraftSpec', 'PRDAttached'],
  Closed: [],
};

The status dropdown should show the current status plus only the valid next statuses. If freezeState is Locked, disable the status dropdown entirely with a tooltip explaining why.

Commit.
